_source_text:
QUEENS COMMUNITY BOARD 7
Land Use Committee Meeting
Monday, April 22, 2024, 7:30 PM
136-56 39th Avenue, Flushing, NY 11354

AGENDA

Item 2. ULURP No. C 240112 ZMQ — Zoning Map Amendment, 37-18 Prince Street

The applicant, Prince Street Development LLC, seeks a zoning map amendment for the property at 37-18 Prince Street, Flushing, NY 11354 (Block 5001, Lot 23). The application proposes to rezone the site from M1-1 to R7A to allow the development of a seven-story residential building with 64 dwelling units.

The public comment period runs through May 6, 2024. Written comments may be directed to the Board office at 136-56 39th Avenue.
title: ULURP C 240112 ZMQ — Zoning Map Amendment, 37-18 Prince Street
summary: Community Board 7 (Queens) to hear a zoning map amendment rezoning 37-18 Prince Street, Flushing from M1-1 to R7A for a seven-story, 64-unit residential building.
